name: venture-studio
description: 6-step pipeline from audience discovery to product execution — research audiences, validate problems, design solutions, build MVPs, and launch products.

skills.name: start
skills.description: Begin a new venture — audience discovery and problem validation

skills.name: run
skills.description: Execute the current stage of the venture pipeline

skills.name: graduate
skills.description: Advance the venture to the next pipeline stage

skills.name: studio
skills.description: Open the studio dashboard — status, metrics, and navigation

VERCEL_TOKEN.description: Vercel deploy token for shipping landing pages and MVPs

GITHUB_TOKEN.description: GitHub personal access token for creating repos and pushing code

postInstall.message: Venture Studio installed. Run /studio to open the dashboard, or /start to begin a new venture.
